field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

RE[.GESTIS.ROMAM.REDI.]TI[.]N[ER]ONE[.]P.QVI[NTILIO.CONSVLIBVS ARAM / [PACIS.A]V[GVST[AE.SENATVS.PRO.]REDITV.MEO.CO[NSACRANDVM.CENSVIT.]AD CAM / [PVM.MARTIVM.IN.QVA.M]AGISTRATVS.ET.SAC[ERDOTES.ET.VIRGINES.]V[EST]ALES / [ANNIVERSARIVM.SACRIFIC]IVM FACER[E.DECREVIT. / [IANVM.]QVIRIN[VM.QVEM.OMNINO.CL]AVSSVM ESS[E.MAIORES NOSTRI VOLVERV]NT / [CVM.]PER TOTVM.I[MPERIVM.PO]PVLI ROMAN[I.TERRA.MARIQVE ES]SE[T.]PARTA.VIC / [TORII]S.PAV.CVM.PRI[VSQVAM].NASCERER.A[.CONDITA.VRBE.B]IS.OMININO.CLAVSVM / [F]VISSE.PRODATVR.M[EMORI]AE,TER,ME.PRIN[VIPE.SENATVS.]CL[AV]DENDVM.ESSE.CE[N]SVIT / [FIL]IOS.MEOS.QVOS.IVV[ENES.M]IHI.ERIPVUIT.FOR[TVNA.G]AIVM.ET.LVCIVM.CAES[AR]ES
